data.title: Top Brass Quietly Double Down on This Under-the-Radar Financial Stock

Insider confidence in Sound Point Meridian Capital, Inc. appears to be on the rise as top executives increase their holdings. Chairman Stephen Ketchum recently purchased 1,000 shares of the company’s stock in a transaction valued at $11,400, while Director Matthew E. Forstenhausler boosted his stake with the acquisition of 2,000 shares worth $23,000. These combined insider buys highlight a notable show of support from leadership for the company’s future prospects.

Recent Updates on SPMC stock

Sound Point Meridian Capital’s shares reacted to Q3 results that showed solid deployment but sharp NAV declines, mark‑to‑market losses, and a dividend cut driven by loan spread compression, higher CLO liability costs, and thin liquidity. Analysts lowered price targets mainly to reflect sustained NAV pressure, reduced earnings power from weaker gap yields, and management’s reset of the common dividend to prioritize balance sheet flexibility and better alignment with portfolio yields.

Spark’s Take on SPMC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SPMC is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak cash conversion (large negative operating/free cash flow versus reported earnings) and a bearish technical setup with the stock below key moving averages. Earnings call takeaways add further pressure due to the distribution cut, significant NAV decline, and limited liquidity. High reported profitability and a debt-free profile are supportive, but valuation is mixed given the high P/E despite a very high (potentially risk-signaling) dividend yield.

data.title: Nasdaq Liquidity at Risk: Sabre Corp Faces Potential Delisting, Higher Capital Costs and Weaker Valuation
data.description:
Sabre Corp (SABR) has disclosed a new risk, in the Share Price & Shareholder Rights category.

President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sabre Corp faces the risk that an active market for its common stock on Nasdaq may not be sustained, which could hinder shareholders’ ability to sell shares without exerting downward pressure on the stock price. A deterioration in liquidity could also constrain Sabre Corp’s capacity to raise equity capital or use its shares as acquisition currency on attractive terms.

If Sabre Corp were delisted from Nasdaq, trading could migrate to over-the-counter venues with lower liquidity, reduced transparency and wider bid-ask spreads, making price discovery and execution more difficult for investors. Such an outcome could further depress valuation, damage market perception and increase the company’s cost of capital over time.

Overall, Wall Street has a Moderate Buy consensus rating on SABR stock based on 2 Buys.

data.title: SoFi’s Growing Home Equity Book: Subordinate Liens, Rate Volatility and Rising Credit Risk
data.description:
Sofi Technologies Inc (SOFI) has disclosed a new risk, in the Debt & Financing category.

President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Sofi Technologies Inc. faces elevated risk from its growing portfolio of home equity loans, which are typically subordinate liens and therefore sit behind first mortgages in a default or foreclosure scenario. This structural subordination makes recoveries more sensitive to property value declines, higher combined loan‑to‑value ratios, and broader economic stress.

Interest rate volatility further compounds this risk, as rising rates can increase payment burdens and delinquencies on variable‑rate loans, while falling rates may trigger prepayments that erode expected yields. In addition, interest rate shifts can depress the fair value of loans held on balance sheet, and limited eligibility for GSE purchase may constrain Sofi Technologies Inc.’s ability to sell these assets and manage portfolio risk.

The average SOFI stock price target is $25.96, implying 32.86% upside potential.

To learn more about Sofi Technologies Inc’s risk factors, click here.
